ops.body: Reconciliation (2026-07-14): the train_watcher / weekly-launchd / auto-promote scope of this task shipped in the cc-steer PACKAGE, not the lab — cc-steer v0.12.0, commits 8e72b62c (feature), 7da3f98b (packaging), 732fe6a1 + c337ad5d (fixes). `cc-steer retrain --component watcher` trains on Tinker under a $15 cap, scores server-side against the frozen eval (~/.cc-steer/eval/), gates via corrected_gate + strict AUC/budget/coverage bar, and auto-promotes with a watch-daemon kickstart. The weekly com.cc-steer.retrain agent runs both lanes Sundays 04:00 via `uvx --from 'cc-steer[retrain]'`. Lab harness/retrain.py is deleted (lab commit f767ca1; snapshot ad14259). Remaining scope here that did NOT ship: promote_gate.py-style judged gating (judged corrected gate stays manual/lab), the 4B/8B/9B base sweep, and E14 futility pilot — re-scope this task to just those or fold them into the lab experiment track. Rollout tracking: cc-notes task 5b1dba29.
